channel.title: Seeing page comment replies
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Seeing page comment replies"

item.title: Re: Seeing page comment replies
item.content:encoded: They just check back to the replies of places they've commented.

item.title: Re: Seeing page comment replies
item.content:encoded: It doesn't have ANY? How do people have conversations here? That's not a rhetorical question, literally I'd like advice about, like. What do people do to ever see replies to their posts.

item.title: Re: Seeing page comment replies
item.content:encoded: Wikidot doesn't have any automated notifications. Closest you could get is maybe setting up an RSS feed, or just checking the discussion threads manually via the list on your wikidot profile.

item.title: Seeing page comment replies
item.content:encoded: I've been trying to start leaving comments on articles when I can. How do I see which comments that I've left have been responded to? I don't seem to be getting any notifications about replies (I found one reply manually). Are there Wikidot preferences I need to set, to receive notifications for any thread I've posted in?
